2605.19768.title: Minimax Optimal Variance-Aware Regret Bounds for Multinomial Logistic MDPs
2605.19768.paper_summary: We study reinforcement learning for episodic Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) whose transitions are modelled by a multinomial logistic (MNL) model. Existing algorithms for MNL mixture MDPs yield a regret of $\smash{\tilde{O}(dH^2\sqrt{T})}$ (Li et al., 2024), where $d$ is the feature dimension, $H$ the episode length, and $T$ the number of episodes. Inspired by the logistic bandit literature (Abeille et al., 2021; Faury et al., 2022; Boudart et al., 2026), we introduce a problem-dependent constant $\barσ\_T \leq 1/2$, measuring the normalised average variance of the optimal downstream value function along the learner's trajectory. We propose an algorithm achieving a regret of $\smash{\tilde{O}(dH^2\barσ\_T\sqrt{T})}$, which recovers the existing bound in the worst case and improves upon it for structured MDPs. For instance, for KL-constrained robust MDPs, $\barσ\_T = O(H^{-1})$, reducing the horizon dependence by a factor $H$. We further establish a matching $\smash{Ω(dH^2\barσ\_T\sqrt{T})}$ lower bound, proving minimax optimality (up to logarithmic factors) and fully characterising the regret complexity of MNL mixture MDPs for the first time.
2605.19768.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究了用多項式邏輯模型（MNL）建模的情節馬爾可夫決策過程（MDPs）的強化學習。現有的MNL混合MDPs算法產生的後悔為$\smash{\tilde{O}(dH^2\sqrt{T})}$（Li et al., 2024），其中$d$是特徵維度，$H$是情節長度，$T$是情節數量。受到邏輯賭徒文獻（Abeille et al., 2021；Faury et al., 2022；Boudart et al., 2026）的啟發，我們引入了一個問題依賴的常數$\barσ\_T \leq 1/2$，用來測量學習者軌跡上最佳下游價值函數的標準化平均方差。我們提出了一種算法，其後悔為$\smash{\tilde{O}(dH^2\barσ\_T\sqrt{T})}$，在最壞情況下恢復現有界限，並對結構化MDPs進行改進。例如，對於KL約束的穩健MDPs，$\barσ\_T = O(H^{-1})$，將視野依賴性降低了$H$的因子。我們進一步建立了一個匹配的$\smash{Ω(dH^2\barσ\_T\sqrt{T})}$下界，證明了最小最大最優性（至對數因子）並首次完全表徵MNL混合MDPs的後悔複雜性。
2605.19768.author: Pierre Boudart et.al.
2605.19768.authors: Pierre Boudart, Pierre Gaillard, Alessandro Rudi
